visual_description: A man in a dark jacket stands in front of a metal-barred window, looking toward the right. Another man with gray hair, wearing a suit, is seen in a close-up, gazing upward with his head slightly tilted. The scene is dimly lit with a greenish hue, and the background appears to be an indoor, possibly industrial or institutional setting.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a steady pace, accompanied by a noticeable sigh at the beginning.
